description_long: This bungalow features a simple, rectangular structure with a low-pitched, dark gable roof and light-colored exterior walls. The roof extends slightly beyond the walls, providing a modest overhang. The facade is plain, with minimal ornamentation and no visible porch or veranda. The base of the building appears to be elevated slightly above ground level, possibly on a platform or foundation. The windows are not distinctly visible, suggesting a minimalist or modern design. The overall appearance is compact and functional, suitable for a suburban or urban neighborhood.
description: A compact, rectangular bungalow with a dark gable roof and light exterior walls, featuring a minimalist, modern design and no visible porch.
description_view_0: Front view showing the light-colored facade and the overhanging dark gable roof.
description_view_1: Side view dominated by the dark roof and a striped base, with minimal wall detail visible.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, with the light wall and roof overhang visible.
description_view_3: Top-down view highlighting the flat, dark roof and the striped base detail.
attribute_window_arrangement: minimalist with few or no visible windows
